description: 轻灵 Qling — local-first Chinese AI Agent CLI workbench
notes: DRAFT manifest — not published to an official Scoop bucket.
Replace url/hash with a pinned npm tarball or GitHub Release asset before publishing.
API keys must be set as user environment variables (never commit secrets).
post_install: Write-Host 'If bin shim is missing, run: npm install -g @qlingzzy/qling@$version' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host 'Then: qling bootstrap && qling setup' -ForegroundColor Cyan
